packageRules.description: The Sentry SDK is bumped by the update-deps workflow's updater action, which writes its own CHANGELOG entry. Most io.sentry artifacts share the same version ref, so any of them would rewrite it and collide with the updater. Leave the whole group to the updater.
Deps bundled into the published plugin are user-facing, so use a fix: title to make Danger require a CHANGELOG entry. Everything else stays build(deps): and is skipped.
